query_basis: Programs table rows with verified state program evidence.
Waiver-like program rows or fallback to verified program rows when the state stores waiver entry in the general spine.
Verified early-intervention or Part C agency rows.
Verified regional education or district pages with special-education routing.

samples.sample_name: Arizona Department of Education Special Education

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 bounded browser-assisted checks on Arizona Department of Education special-education leaves plus current live school_district fallback rows.
blocker_evidence: Arizona Department of Education special-education leaves returned Cloudflare verification shells in the bounded browser lane, and current school_district rows remain generic county fallback rows pointing at the statewide AZED special-education root instead of district-owned evidence pages.

samples.sample_name: Arizona Department of Education Special Education Challenge Shell
samples.evidence_snippet: A bounded browser-assisted check on the official AZED special-education leaf returned only a Cloudflare security-verification shell titled "Just a moment..." instead of district or dispute-routing content.

samples.sample_name: Apache County School District Fallback Row
samples.evidence_snippet: Current Apache County school_district coverage still points at the statewide AZED special-education root and is labeled as a county fallback rather than a district-owned evidence page.

samples.sample_name: Cochise County School District Fallback Row
samples.evidence_snippet: Current Cochise County school_district coverage still points at the statewide AZED special-education root and is labeled as a county fallback rather than a district-owned evidence page.

query_basis: Verified programs with VR or Pre-ETS context.
Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Arizona evidence on disk explicitly preserves federally mandated Protection and Advocacy designation text for Arizona.

samples.evidence_snippet: DRAZ is the federally mandated protection and advocacy system for Arizona.

query_basis: Reviewed 2026-06-22 live Encircle Families homepage, about, and services leaves prove statewide parent-support and training scope, but no fetched first-party page preserves explicit PTI / Parent Training and Information designation text.
blocker_evidence: The reviewed live Encircle Families pages preserve Arizona family-support and training evidence, but not explicit PTI / Parent Training and Information Center designation text.

samples.evidence_snippet: Encircle Families helps parents and caregivers of children with disabilities so their whole family can thrive.

Encircle Families says parents can better advocate for their children when they have access to the knowledge and support of experienced families, but the live about page still does not preserve PTI designation text.

The live services page says Encircle Families provides programs and services at no cost to families and includes support and training programs, but it still does not explicitly identify the organization as Arizona's Parent Training and Information Center.

query_basis: Reviewed first-party Disability Rights Arizona evidence on disk explicitly preserves statewide disability legal-services language plus assistance intake routing.

samples.evidence_snippet: Disability Rights Arizona offers free legal services for Arizonans with disabilities. Apply for Assistance.

query_basis: Verified ABLE program pages from the program spine.
Reviewed 2026-06-22 bounded browser-assisted checks on Arizona DES roots plus current live county_office fallback rows.
blocker_evidence: Arizona DES local-office roots returned Cloudflare verification shells in the bounded browser lane, while current county_office rows are largely DOI-derived FAA placeholders or generic legacy location rows rather than reviewed county-specific official office leaves.

samples.evidence_snippet: A bounded browser-assisted check on the official Arizona DES root returned only a Cloudflare security-verification shell titled "Just a moment..." instead of local-office locator content.
Current county_office coverage for multiple Arizona counties still relies on a DOI-derived FAA placeholder row instead of a reviewed county-specific official office leaf.
Greenlee County coverage still points at a legacy generic Arizona locations root rather than a reviewed county-specific official office page.
